overview: Frontend Developer with 3.5 years of experience at Glomli Technology, creating user-friendly, visually engaging, and performance-focused web experiences.
Hands-on with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js, Bootstrap, and TailwindCSS, focused on building clean, maintainable, and responsive interfaces.
Experienced not only in frontend development but also in media and digital content production, with a strong eye for visual design, branding, and content presentation.
Adaptable teammate with a solution-oriented mindset, delivering digital products that balance user needs, visual quality, and business goals.

experience.summary: Lead and build modern web experiences for national-scale initiatives (GoTürkiye, Culture Route Festival, AKM, Health Türkiye), delivering responsive UIs, email templates, and content workflows with React, Next.js, TypeScript, Bootstrap, and TailwindCSS.
Supported software and content development, contributing to UI improvements and internal tools while learning modern frontend practices and collaborative workflows.

collaboratedProjects.title: GoTürkiye — Official Travel Guide
collaboratedProjects.description: Developed email templates and content workflows for Türkiye's official tourism platform under the Ministry of Culture and Tourism.
collaboratedProjects.subtitle: Ministry of Culture and Tourism - Glomil

collaboratedProjects.description: Built web-based software and email systems to enhance event communication for national festivals, partnered with the Ministry of Culture and Tourism.
collaboratedProjects.subtitle: Ministry of Culture and Tourism - Glomil

collaboratedProjects.title: Atatürk Cultural Center (AKM)
collaboratedProjects.description: Created digital content and email templates to elevate the cultural center's online presence in collaboration with the Ministry of Culture and Tourism.
collaboratedProjects.subtitle: Ministry of Culture and Tourism - Glomil

collaboratedProjects.title: Health Türkiye
collaboratedProjects.description: Contributed to software and content development to strengthen global visibility and user experience for the platform under the Ministry of Health.
collaboratedProjects.subtitle: Ministry of Health - Glomil
